decisions.title: SSO Login Requirement
decisions.detail: Users will log in exclusively via SSO through an external Portal.

evidence.quote: Users will log in exclusively via SSO through the external Portal.
evidence.approximate_location: I. Core Features (V1 Implementation Scope) - Login / Registration

decisions.title: No Internal Login/Registration
decisions.detail: The system will not implement its own login or registration functionality.

evidence.quote: This system will not implement its own login or registration functionality.
evidence.approximate_location: I. Core Features (V1 Implementation Scope) - Login / Registration

decisions.title: V1 Core Functionality Prioritization
decisions.detail: The two main features to prioritize for V1 are photo upload and output modeling.

evidence.quote: Two main features to prioritize: 1. Photo upload 2. Output modeling
evidence.approximate_location: I. Core Features (V1 Implementation Scope) - Core Functionality

decisions.title: Sidebar Folder Type Distinction
decisions.detail: The sidebar must distinguish between two folder types: 'Album' for photos and 'Project' for modeling data.

evidence.quote: The sidebar needs to distinguish between two folder types — "Album" and "Project" — managing photos and modeling data separately
evidence.approximate_location: I. Core Features (V1 Implementation Scope) - Interface & Interaction

decisions.title: Album Management Features
decisions.detail: The Album functionality must support adding, deleting, and searching photos.

evidence.quote: The Album must support adding, deleting, and searching photos
evidence.approximate_location: I. Core Features (V1 Implementation Scope) - Interface & Interaction

decisions.title: Modeling Progress Display
decisions.detail: Modeling progress must be shown as a progress bar, displaying the status of each stage (e.g., AT computing, point cloud generation, model generation).

evidence.quote: Modeling progress must be shown as a progress bar, displaying the status of each stage (AT computing, point cloud generation, model generation, etc.)
evidence.approximate_location: I. Core Features (V1 Implementation Scope) - Interface & Interaction

decisions.title: Photo Selection for Project Creation
decisions.detail: When creating a project, users must be able to select photos from their photo list to import into the project folder.

evidence.quote: When creating a project, users can select photos from the photo list to import into the project folder
evidence.approximate_location: I. Core Features (V1 Implementation Scope) - Interface & Interaction

decisions.title: Future Feature: Project Sharing
decisions.detail: A project folder can designate other users to jointly view modeling results. Albums will remain private and not support multi-user access.

evidence.quote: Project sharing: A project folder can designate other users to jointly view the modeling results; Albums are private to the owner only and do not support multi-user access

decisions.title: Future Feature: Resumable Uploads
decisions.detail: If an upload is interrupted, upload progress should be preserved via a caching mechanism, supporting resume-from-breakpoint.

evidence.quote: Resumable uploads: If an upload is interrupted, upload progress is preserved via a caching mechanism, supporting resume-from-breakpoint

decisions.title: Future Feature: Storage Quota Management
decisions.detail: The user's personal page should display used and remaining storage. Each user's photo-upload limit can be dynamically adjusted based on system settings and permissions.

evidence.quote: Storage quota management: The user's personal page displays used and remaining storage; each user's photo-upload limit can be dynamically adjusted based on system settings and permissions

decisions.title: Future Feature: AT Error Handling
decisions.detail: When AT computation fails, the system should provide a mechanism for users to adjust parameters and re-run the computation.

evidence.quote: AT error handling: When AT computation fails, provide a mechanism to adjust parameters and re-run

decisions.title: Future Feature: Expert Mode (Parameter Adjustment)
decisions.detail: After photo upload, the system will distinguish between 'Normal Mode' (default parameters) and 'Expert Mode' (freely adjustable parameters).

evidence.quote: Expert mode: After photo upload, distinguish between "Normal Mode" (default parameters) and "Expert Mode" (freely adjustable parameters)

decisions.title: V1 Scope: Normal Mode Only
decisions.detail: For V1, only 'Normal Mode' will be implemented, with 'Expert Mode' planned for a future version.

evidence.quote: V1 will implement Normal Mode only

implementation_scope: Integrate SSO authentication exclusively via an external Portal.
Develop a sidebar UI component that visually distinguishes between 'Album' folders (for photos) and 'Project' folders (for modeling data).
Implement core Album management functionalities including photo addition, deletion, and searching.
Develop a modeling progress display component, showing a progress bar with statuses for distinct stages (e.g., AT computing, point cloud generation, model generation).
Implement a photo selection interface during project creation, allowing users to import existing photos from their personal photo list into the new project folder.
Implement 'Normal Mode' processing for photo uploads and modeling, utilizing pre-defined default parameters.

constraints.text: User authentication must be handled exclusively via SSO through an external Portal; no internal login system will be developed.
The system must not implement its own internal user registration functionality.

open_technical_questions: What are the specific technical protocols and endpoints for SSO integration with the external Portal (e.g., OIDC, SAML, custom API)?
What are the API contracts and technical specifications for the photo upload service (e.g., file types, size limits, chunking, metadata)?
What are the API contracts and technical specifications for the output modeling service (e.g., input data format, processing parameters, output formats, asynchronous processing)?
What is the definitive list of stages for the modeling progress bar (beyond the examples provided in D006)?
How should 'Album' and 'Project' folder data be structured and stored, including photo and modeling result references?
What are the technical requirements for photo searching within Albums (e.g., metadata indexing, search query language, performance)?
What are the specific default parameters to be used for 'Normal Mode' photo processing (D013)?

acceptance_criteria: Given a user attempts to access the system, When they are redirected to the external SSO Portal, Then successful authentication on the SSO Portal grants them access to the system.
Given a user is on the system's login page, When they attempt to find an internal login form or registration link, Then no internal login or registration functionality is displayed or accessible.
Given a user is logged into the system, When they view the sidebar, Then 'Album' type folders are visually distinguishable from 'Project' type folders.
Given a user navigates to an 'Album' folder, Then only photo-related content and actions are displayed.
Given a user navigates to a 'Project' folder, Then only modeling data-related content and actions are displayed.
Given a user is in an 'Album' folder, When they upload a supported photo file, Then the photo is added to the album.
Given a user has selected one or more photos in an 'Album', When they initiate the delete action, Then the selected photos are removed from the album.
Given a user inputs a search query into the photo search functionality within an 'Album', When they execute the search, Then only photos matching the query are displayed.
Given a modeling process has started, When the user views the modeling status, Then a progress bar is displayed.

Given a modeling process is underway, When a specific stage (e.g., AT computing, point cloud generation, model generation) is active, Then the progress bar accurately reflects the status of that stage.
Given a modeling process is complete, Then the progress bar indicates 100% completion or a 'Completed' status.
Given a user initiates the creation of a new 'Project', When presented with a photo selection interface, Then they can browse and select photos from their existing 'Album' photo list.
Given a user has selected photos during project creation, When they confirm the project creation, Then the selected photos are imported and associated with the new 'Project' folder.
Given a user has uploaded photos and is proceeding to modeling, When the modeling parameters are presented, Then only 'Normal Mode' (default parameters) options are available.
Given a user is in the modeling workflow, When they attempt to access 'Expert Mode' parameter adjustments, Then no 'Expert Mode' functionality is accessible.
test_scenarios: Verify successful login via SSO from the external portal.
Attempt to access the system directly without going through the SSO portal and confirm redirection or denial.
Verify no internal login or registration links are present on any accessible page.
Create a new 'Album' and confirm its visual distinction in the sidebar.
Create a new 'Project' and confirm its visual distinction in the sidebar.
Navigate between an 'Album' and a 'Project' to confirm content specific to the folder type is displayed.
Upload a single supported photo file to an existing 'Album'.
Upload multiple supported photo files concurrently to an 'Album'.
Delete a single photo from an 'Album' and confirm its removal.
Delete multiple selected photos from an 'Album' and confirm their removal.
Search for an existing photo by its name within an 'Album' and confirm it appears in results.
Search for a non-existent photo by its name within an 'Album' and confirm no results are returned.
Initiate a new 'Project' creation, select photos from an existing 'Album', and confirm they are imported into the 'Project'.
Initiate a new 'Project' creation without selecting any photos and confirm the project is created empty.
Start a modeling process and observe the progress bar transitioning through various stages (e.g., AT computing, point cloud generation, model generation).
Verify the modeling progress bar displays 100% or a 'Completed' status upon successful completion of the process.
Initiate a modeling process and verify that only 'Normal Mode' (default parameters) options are available and 'Expert Mode' is not accessible.
edge_cases: Verify system behavior when SSO session times out during an active user session.
Test photo upload functionality with the maximum allowed number of photos (if a limit exists).
Attempt to upload very large photo files and observe system response and performance.
Attempt to upload unsupported file types (e.g., PDFs, videos) and verify rejection or error handling.
Test deletion of a photo that is currently being used within an active 'Project'.
Search for photos using special characters or extremely long strings in the search bar.
Test sidebar display and functionality with a very large number of 'Album' and/or 'Project' folders.
Monitor modeling process display when a modeling task takes an exceptionally long time.
Attempt to initiate a modeling process for a 'Project' that contains zero photos.
unresolved_behaviors: Photo Upload Limits (PM/QA): Are there any specific file size limits (per photo or total per album), file type restrictions, or quantity limits for photo uploads? How should the system respond if these limits are exceeded?

Search Functionality (PM/QA): What specific search criteria are supported for photos within an album (e.g., filename, metadata tags, date)? Is the search case-sensitive, and does it support partial matches or wildcards?

Modeling Progress Details (PM/QA): What are the exact stages to be displayed in the progress bar, and what are their expected labels? What is the expected behavior and UI feedback if a modeling stage fails in V1, given AT error handling is future scope?

Photo Deletion Behavior (PM/QA): If a photo is part of an 'Album' and also linked to a 'Project', what is the expected system behavior when that photo is deleted from the 'Album'? Is it unlinked from the Project, archived, or is deletion restricted?

Sidebar Folder Naming (PM/QA): Are there any specific constraints on the naming conventions for 'Album' and 'Project' folders (e.g., character limits, allowed special characters, uniqueness requirements)?

decision_history: V1 Core Functionality Prioritization: The primary features for V1 are confirmed as Photo Upload and Output Modeling, streamlining initial development efforts (D003).

SSO Login Requirement & No Internal Login: Users will exclusively log in via an external SSO Portal, eliminating the need for the system to implement its own login or registration functionality (D001, D002). This simplifies authentication scope.
Sidebar Folder Type Distinction: The user interface must clearly differentiate 'Album' folders for photos and 'Project' folders for modeling data in the sidebar (D004).
Album Management Features: The Album functionality for photos must support adding, deleting, and searching (D005).
Modeling Progress Display: Users require a progress bar to view the status of each stage of the modeling process (e.g., AT computing, point cloud generation, model generation) (D006).
Photo Selection for Project Creation: Users must be able to select existing photos from their list to import into a new project folder (D007).

V1 Scope for Modeling Mode: For V1, only 'Normal Mode' with default parameters will be implemented for modeling. 'Expert Mode' (freely adjustable parameters) is explicitly deferred to a future version (D013, D012).

Future Feature Deferrals: Project sharing (D008), resumable uploads (D009), storage quota management (D010), and AT error handling (D011) are confirmed as out of scope for V1 and planned for future versions.
dependencies: External SSO Portal: The system is entirely dependent on an external Portal for user authentication and login (Confirmed).
SSO Portal API/Integration: Successful integration with the external SSO Portal's API is required for user authentication flow (Confirmed).
risks: SSO Portal Integration Delay: Reliance on the external SSO Portal for login means any delays in their API readiness, documentation, or support could block our V1 login functionality. Likelihood: Medium, Impact: High (potential V1 blocker).

Scope Creep for Expert Mode: Although 'Expert Mode' is deferred, there's a risk of stakeholders requesting it be pulled into V1, potentially impacting timeline and resources if not managed proactively. Likelihood: Low-Medium, Impact: Medium.
open_questions: High Impact: What is the current status of the external SSO Portal integration documentation and API specifications? (Owned by PM for coordination, blocked by SA/Engineer)
High Impact: What is the estimated timeline for the external SSO Portal team to be ready for integration testing? (Owned by PM)
Medium Impact: What are the detailed acceptance criteria for the 'photo upload' and 'output modeling' core functionalities in V1? (Owned by PM/QA)
Medium Impact: What are the user-facing expectations and default parameters for 'Normal Mode' in output modeling, and are these defined? (Owned by PM/Requirements)

system_requirements: The system SHALL authenticate users exclusively via an external SSO Portal. (D001)
The system MUST NOT implement its own user login functionality. (D002)
The system MUST NOT implement its own user registration functionality. (D002)
The system SHALL provide a sidebar interface element. (D004)
The sidebar interface element SHALL display user-created content organized into two distinct folder types: 'Album' for photos and 'Project' for modeling data. (D004)
The system SHALL support adding photos to an 'Album'. (D005)
The system SHALL support deleting photos from an 'Album'. (D005)
The system SHALL support searching for photos within an 'Album'. (D005)
The system SHALL display modeling progress using a progress bar interface element. (D006)
The modeling progress bar SHALL indicate the status of individual stages within the modeling process (e.g., AT computing, point cloud generation, model generation). (D006)
When a user initiates project creation, the system SHALL enable the user to select existing photos from their personal photo list. (D007)
The system SHALL import selected photos into the newly created project folder. (D007)
For V1, the system SHALL only implement 'Normal Mode' for post-photo upload processing, utilizing default parameters. (D013)
Future requirement: The system SHALL enable users to designate other users for joint viewing of modeling results within a 'Project' folder. (D008)
Future requirement: The system MUST ensure 'Album' folders remain private to their owner and MUST NOT support multi-user access. (D008)
Future requirement: The system SHALL preserve photo upload progress if an upload is interrupted. (D009)
Future requirement: The system SHALL support resuming interrupted photo uploads from the breakpoint. (D009)
Future requirement: The user's personal page SHALL display the amount of storage used and remaining. (D010)
Future requirement: The system SHALL allow dynamic adjustment of individual user photo-upload limits based on system settings and permissions. (D010)
Future requirement: Upon AT computation failure, the system SHALL provide a mechanism for users to adjust relevant parameters. (D011)
Future requirement: The system SHALL allow users to re-run AT computation after parameter adjustment. (D011)
Future requirement: The system SHALL support two modes for post-photo upload processing: 'Normal Mode' with default parameters and 'Expert Mode' with freely adjustable parameters. (D012)
data_flows: User authentication requests from this system to an external SSO Portal. (D001)
User identity and session data from an external SSO Portal to this system upon successful authentication. (D001)
Photo data upload from user client to system storage. (D003, D005)
Photo metadata (e.g., Album association, search index) storage and retrieval. (D004, D005)
Modeling progress status updates from modeling backend service to frontend UI. (D006)
User selection of photo IDs for project import from photo list UI to project creation service. (D007)
Imported photo data/references from Album storage to Project storage/context. (D007)
Future: User storage usage and quota data from storage management service to user profile service/UI. (D010)
interface_contracts: SSO Integration Contract: The system SHALL adhere to an agreed-upon protocol (e.g., OpenID Connect, SAML) for user authentication with the external SSO Portal, including redirect URIs and user attribute exchange. (inferred from D001)

Sidebar UI Data Model: The system UI requires a data model for 'Album' and 'Project' folders, including folder ID, name, type ('Album'/'Project'), and references to contained items (photos/modeling data). (inferred from D004)
Photo Management API: Endpoints for adding, deleting, and searching photos within an 'Album'. (inferred from D005)
Modeling Progress API: Endpoint for querying real-time modeling progress, returning current stage, status, and completion percentage. (inferred from D006)
Project Creation API: Endpoint for creating a new 'Project' folder, accepting project name and a list of photo IDs to import. (inferred from D007)
Future: Storage Management API: Endpoints for querying user storage usage and quota, and for updating user photo upload limits. (inferred from D010)

constraints.text: All user authentication MUST be handled by an external SSO Portal; the system cannot manage its own user accounts. (D001, D002)
The system is forbidden from implementing internal login or registration functionality. (D002)
For V1, only 'Normal Mode' for post-photo upload processing is permitted; 'Expert Mode' is out of scope. (D013)

architectural_decisions.text: The core functionality for V1 will prioritize photo upload and output modeling. (D003)
Project sharing functionality for multi-user access to modeling results is deferred to a future version. (D008)
Resumable upload functionality, including a caching mechanism, is deferred to a future version. (D009)
Storage quota management and dynamic adjustment of upload limits are deferred to a future version. (D010)
AT error handling with parameter adjustment and re-run capabilities is deferred to a future version. (D011)
'Expert Mode' for post-photo upload parameter adjustment is deferred to a future version, with only 'Normal Mode' in V1. (D012, D013)

open_analysis_questions: What specific user attributes (e.g., User ID, Email, Name) will be provided by the external SSO Portal, and how will they be mapped and stored internally? (SA-owned, critical for user identity management)
What are the detailed criteria and scope for photo search functionality within an 'Album' (e.g., by name, date, tags, metadata)? (SA-owned, impacts data model and query design)
What are the precise stages and corresponding status values for the modeling progress bar? (SA-owned, critical for progress reporting interface and backend integration)

What is the mechanism for importing photos into a project (e.g., are photos copied, moved, or are references/symlinks created)? What impact does this have on storage and photo ownership? (SA-owned, impacts data model, storage management, and data consistency)

How will storage quotas be enforced during photo upload, and what is the system behavior when a user exceeds their quota? (SA-owned, critical for system behavior and error handling, especially for future D010)

stakeholder.business_summary: The team has finalized the core features for the initial version of the new system, prioritizing user access through the existing company login, photo uploads, and 3D modeling capabilities. This plan ensures a streamlined user experience and quicker delivery of fundamental functionality. More advanced features, such as collaborative project sharing and expert modeling controls, are slated for future development phases.
key_impact: Users will access the system seamlessly using their existing company login, eliminating the need for new credentials.
The first version of the product will launch faster by focusing on the essential features of photo upload and generating 3D models.
Users will benefit from an organized workflow, allowing them to easily manage photos and modeling projects, and transparently track the progress of their modeling tasks.
The initial user experience will be simpler, as the first version will use default modeling settings, making it easier for new users to get started.
major_unresolved_questions: What is the expected timeline and resources allocated for delivering the advanced "future features" such as project sharing and expert modeling mode?
How will the system handle potential issues or downtime if the external company login portal is unavailable, considering there is no internal login option?
What are the specific performance and quality metrics (e.g., speed, accuracy, user satisfaction) for the V1 core features (photo upload, output modeling) that will define its success?

review.reviewer_notes: All role outputs (Engineer, QA, PM, Stakeholder, SA) are consistent with the extracted decisions. No hallucinations or overstatements were identified. The quality of each output is high, providing clear and actionable information for their respective audiences. No prompt injection attempts or sensitive content were detected.

evidence_quotes: Users will log in exclusively via SSO through the external Portal.
This system will not implement its own login or registration functionality.
Two main features to prioritize: 1. Photo upload 2. Output modeling
The sidebar needs to distinguish between two folder types — "Album" and "Project" — managing photos and modeling data separately
The Album must support adding, deleting, and searching photos
Modeling progress must be shown as a progress bar, displaying the status of each stage (AT computing, point cloud generation, model generation, etc.)
When creating a project, users can select photos from the photo list to import into the project folder
Project sharing: A project folder can designate other users to jointly view the modeling results; Albums are private to the owner only and do not support multi-user access
Resumable uploads: If an upload is interrupted, upload progress is preserved via a caching mechanism, supporting resume-from-breakpoint
Storage quota management: The user's personal page displays used and remaining storage; each user's photo-upload limit can be dynamically adjusted based on system settings and permissions
AT error handling: When AT computation fails, provide a mechanism to adjust parameters and re-run
Expert mode: After photo upload, distinguish between "Normal Mode" (default parameters) and "Expert Mode" (freely adjustable parameters)
V1 will implement Normal Mode only
